data.description: Michelin reports trading own shares on Sept 24, 2025.

data.title: NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. to change business focus to digital assets & fintech with approval by shareholders needed.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 24, 2025, NextGen Digital Platforms Inc. (CSE:NXT) (OTCQB:NXTDF) (FSE:Z12) has received conditional approval from the Canadian Securities Exchange for its business expansion into the digital asset ecosystem and the adoption of a cryptocurrency treasury management plan. The proposed "Change of Business" requires majority approval from the Company's shareholders through written consent resolutions. This move positions NextGen as a key player in bridging traditional capital markets with Web3 infrastructure.
Details of share transactions made between September 15th and 19th, 2025 have been revealed.

data.title: MedX Holdings signs 5 franchise deals for national expansion, including Vegas flagship, set to boost revenue.
data.description: MedX Holdings is on track for a significant nationwide expansion with the recent addition of five new franchises and the highly anticipated opening of its flagship location in Las Vegas. The company's expansion efforts mark a strategic move to establish its presence in key markets across the country, with a focus on delivering its unique services to a wider customer base. This growth initiative underscores MedX Holdings' commitment to reaching a broader audience and driving increased revenue.

data.title: Inventor from Osgood, Ind. creates subframe-supported transmission holder to prevent interference, addresses issue faced by automotive mechanics.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 24, 2025, an inventor from Osgood, Indiana, highlighted the common issue faced by professional automotive mechanics when using jacks and jackstands in conjunction with an engine hoist. The inventor noted that these tools often clash, creating obstacles during engine extraction. To address this challenge, the inventor introduced a new solution called POWER. This innovative product aims to streamline the engine extraction process by eliminating interference between jacks, jackstands, and engine hoists. The invention has garnered attention for its potential to enhance efficiency and safety in automotive repair settings.

data.title: $50 million donated by MacKenzie Scott boosts Native Forward Scholars Fund, largest award yet in Indian Country, aiding 35% surge in scholarship demand.
data.description: Albuquerque, New Mexico - On September 24, 2025, the Native Forward Scholars Fund, a leading provider of scholarships to Native students, received a significant investment of $50 million. This marks a major milestone for the organization, which has been making a positive impact for 55 years. The demand for scholarships has surged by 35%, highlighting the pressing need for financial support in the Native community. This generous donation will undoubtedly help more Native students access higher education and pave the way for a brighter future.

data.title: OM price hits $0.17, its 52-week low, with 1.22% daily gains as RSI sits at 30.26, hinting at a possible reversal.
data.description: The trading price of OM is currently sitting at $0.17, which equals its lowest point of the year. However, there has been a slight increase of 1.22% in daily gains. Analysis of the technical aspects indicates possible signs of a turnaround, notably with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 30.26.

data.title: American RV manufacturer Thor Industries (NYSE: THO) stock up due to strong Q4 results, EPS $2.36 beating estimates of $1.27, sales $2.523B.
data.description: Thor Industries, Inc., an American RV manufacturer, saw a rise in shares after reporting strong fourth-quarter results. They reported earnings per share of $2.36, surpassing the estimated $1.27, with sales of $2.523 billion slightly beating the expected $2.333 billion. The North American Towable RV segment experienced a 4.6% decrease in net sales at $888.7 million, with unit shipments down 10.1%. Despite these declines, the gross profit margin improved to 13.3%, which is a 70 basis point increase. This was attributed to strategic initiatives executed during the fiscal year.

data.description: Avant Technologies, Inc. (OTCQB: AVAI) based in Las Vegas disclosed today the withdrawal of its press release dated September 24, 2025, concerning a reported Joint Venture and License Agreement with Art-Islets Pte. Ltd. and Austrianova.

data.description: The price of EIGEN has surged by 3% to $1.82, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 60.57 and the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicating bullish momentum. Technical analysis signals predict ongoing upward momentum for EigenLayer.

data.title: Quantum computing stocks like RGTI are soaring, with expert predicting strong growth due to retail investors and government support. B. Riley analyst raises price targets for sector, noting rapid technological advancements. IonQ identified as revenue growth leader.
data.description: Investor interest in quantum computing companies is surging, bolstered by significant retail investment and strong government backing. This trend has propelled the sector to new heights, with one analyst showing unwavering confidence in quantum stocks. RGTI stock is gaining momentum once again. Analyst Craig Ellis of B. Riley recently lifted the price targets for the quantum industry, citing rapid technological progress and business accomplishments that surpass previous expectations. IonQ, Inc. (NYSE: IONQ) was specifically highlighted by Ellis as a frontrunner in revenue growth. For more in-depth information, visit the full article on Benzinga.com.
